name: Deity VO-7U Boom Arm Kit
description: Level up your home podcasting game with the black VO-7U Dynamic Supercardioid USB Streamer Microphone Kit with Boom Arm from Deity.

features.Key Features:: For Podcasting, Streaming & Gaming | Boom Arm, 9.8' Cables & Foam Pop Filter | Broadcast Sound from Home Studio | Large-Diaphragm Dynamic Capsule | Supercardioid Pickup Cuts Background | 12 x RGB LED Lighting Effects | USB Type-C for Computers, Mobile Devices | Adjustable Mic Gain + Analog Limiter | 3.5mm Headphone Jack | Metal Body with Floating Friction Pivot
features.What's in The Box?: Deity Microphones VO-7U Dynamic Supercardioid USB Streamer Microphone Kit with Boom Arm (Black) | Boom Arm Stand | Desk Clamp | Foam Pop Filter | USB Type-A to USB Type-C Cable (9.8') | USB Type-C to USB Type-C Cable (9.8')
